nodes.label: Cardholder
nodes.notes: Physical card presentation. Tap, chip, or swipe at POS.

nodes.label: POS Terminal
nodes.notes: Req 9.9: Protect POI devices from tampering. PTS-validated hardware required.

nodes.label: Store Firewall
nodes.notes: Req 1: Segment store network. POS VLAN must be isolated from general store LAN.

nodes.label: IDS / IPS
nodes.notes: Req 10.7 / 11.5: Detect intrusions and file-change events in real time.

nodes.label: Payment Application
nodes.notes: Req 6: PA-DSS validated or assessed payment software. No PAN in logs.

nodes.label: HSM
nodes.notes: Req 3.7: Manages PIN encryption keys and PAN encryption keys. FIPS 140-2 L3.

nodes.label: Payment Gateway
nodes.notes: Routes auth and settlement to card networks and acquiring bank.

nodes.label: Log Server
nodes.notes: Req 10: Centralised, tamper-evident audit logs. Retain 12 months (3 months online).

nodes.label: Card Network
nodes.notes: External — Visa / MC / Amex network. Out of merchant CDE scope.

nodes.label: Acquiring Bank
nodes.notes: External — processes settlement. Out of merchant CDE scope.
